scripts: jQuery( function ( $ ) { $( 'a[href*="#"]:not([href="#"]):not([href="#carousel-screens"])' ).click( function() { if ( location.pathname.replace( /^\//, '' ) == this.pathname.replace( /^\//,'') && location.hostname == this.hostname ) { var target = $( this.hash ); target = target.length ? target : $('[name=' + this.hash.slice(1) +']'); if ( target.length ) { $( 'html,body' ).animate( { scrollTop: target.offset().top }, 350 ); return false; } } }); var hashOnLoad = window.location.hash; if( hashOnLoad ) { var target = $( hashOnLoad ); if ( target.length ) { $( 'html,body' ).animate( { scrollTop: target.offset().top }, 350 ); return false; } } } );

$(function(){$('.typed').typed({strings: ['festival', 'salon', 'fédération', 'théâtre', 'ville', 'association', 'université', 'entreprise', 'palais des congrès', 'fablab', 'tiers-lieu', 'caserne', 'diocèse', 'hôpital'],typeSpeed: 40, startDelay: 1000, backDelay: 2000, loop: true });});
